_meta.description: Canonical version map for HeadyMe/Heady-pre-production. Declares the authoritative file for each duplicated component group and enumerates deprecated variants for removal.
selectionRules: v2 supersedes v1 — if a -v2 variant exists it is canonical
enhanced or hardened variant supersedes plain variant
For bee-factory, src/orchestration/ is canonical over src/bees/ (bees copy is a projection)
pipeline-core.js is canonical for pipeline (dedicated src/pipeline/ directory)

canonical.reason: Latest version with full feature set; supersedes conductor.js and heady-conductor.js per v2 promotion rule

retained.reason: Distinct functionality — continuous background orchestration loop; not a duplicate of heady-conductor-v2
Distinct functionality — cloud-specific orchestration layer; not a duplicate of heady-conductor-v2

canonical.reason: Located in the dedicated src/pipeline/ directory; represents the authoritative, stripped-down core pipeline abstraction
v2 supersedes v1; orchestration location is authoritative. dynamic-bee-factory-enhanced.js is also retained for its enhanced capabilities.

deprecated.note: Projection copy in src/bees/ — remove in favour of orchestration canonical

retained.reason: Enhanced variant with dynamic capabilities; distinct feature surface from bee-factory-v2.js; keep until functionality merged into canonical

canonical.reason: v2 supersedes swarm-consensus.js per v2 promotion rule

retained.reason: Distinct functionality — coordination layer that orchestrates multiple swarm instances; not a duplicate of consensus logic
Distinct functionality — higher-order intelligence/decision layer above consensus; not a duplicate
Distinct functionality — bootstrap and startup sequence for swarm; not a duplicate

canonical.reason: Primary self-awareness module; self-correction-loop and self-optimizer provide distinct supporting functionality and are retained separately

retained.reason: Distinct functionality — active correction loop triggered by self-awareness signals; not a duplicate
Distinct functionality — performance optimisation pass driven by self-awareness data; not a duplicate

canonical.reason: v2 supersedes circuit-breaker.js per v2 promotion rule

retained.reason: Distinct functionality — orchestrates multiple circuit breaker instances across services; not a duplicate of the core breaker

canonical.reason: Hardened variant is canonical per hardened/enhanced promotion rule; includes security-grade limits and resilience improvements over v2
